query:
UPDATE sellers s SET 
  totalSales = COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved'), 0),
  totalPoints = COALESCE((SELECT SUM(points) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved'), 0)
WHERE active = true;
